title: ISRO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ISRO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
